workload.comparabilityNotes: Doe-owned apples-to-apples Monte Carlo compute contract. Both sides execute the same deterministic fixed-sample path-tracing command stream and identical reduction passes under the runtime compare harness.
workload.description: Fixed-shape Monte Carlo compute workload with 131072 path threads, 256 samples per path, 8 bounces per sample, and a deterministic reduction over accumulated path radiance.
workload.name: monte carlo fixed samples 131072 paths 256 samples 8 bounces

workloadManifest.freshnessReason: manifest matches generated lane amd_vulkan from backend workload catalog
